lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Caroline.

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: Brave [player name], have you any news about my son and his father?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm working on it now Caroline.

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: Please bring them back safe and sound.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll do my best.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: Is there any chance you could help me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: It's my husband, he works on a fishing platform. Once a month he takes our son, Kennith, out with him.

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: They usually write to me regularly, but I've heard nothing all week. It's very strange.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe the post was lost!

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: Maybe, but no-one's heard from the other fishermen on the platform. Their families are becoming quite concerned.

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: Is there any chance you could visit the platform and find out what's going on?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose so, how do I get there?

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: That's very good of you [player name]. My friend Holgart will take you there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll go and see if they're ok.

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: I'll reward you for your time. It'll give me peace of mind to know Kennith and my husband, Kent, are safe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I'm too busy.

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: That's a shame.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye.

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: Bye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Holgart.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Hello m'hearty. Did you manage to make some swamp paste?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid not.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: It's simply swamp tar mixed with flour heated over a fire. Unfortunately the only supply of swamp tar is in the swamps below Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: I can't fix my row boat without it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll try to find some.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I have some here.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Superb, this looks great.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Right me hearty. Let's get this boat fixed.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Huzzah! We've fixed the leaky old tub.

sections.title: Talking to Holgart after fixing the boat

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Holgart.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Hello again land lover. There's some strange goings on, on that platform, I tell you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will you take me there?

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Of course m'hearty. If that's what you want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm keeping away from there.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Fair enough m'hearty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Hello m'hearty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I would like a ride on your boat to the fishing platform.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: I'm afraid it isn't sea worthy, it's full of holes. To fill the holes I'll need some swamp paste.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Swamp paste?

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Yes, swamp tar mixed with flour and heated over a fire.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: In fact, unless me nose be mistaken, you've got some in yer pack.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes, I forgot about that stuff. Can you use it?

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Aye, that be perfect.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Right me hearty. Let's get this boat fixed.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Huzzah! We've fixed the leaky old tub.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I find swamp tar?

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Unfortunately the only supply of swamp tar is in the swamps below Lumbridge. It's too far for an old man like me to travel.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: If you make me some swamp paste I'll give you a ride in my boat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll see what I can do.

sections.title: Talking to Holgart at the Fishing Platform

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, Holgart.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Have you had enough of this place yet? It's really starting to scare me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm going to stay a while.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Okay... you're the boss.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, let's go back.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Okay m'hearty, jump on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: You are not part of our family...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Umm. Not last time I checked.

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Soon you will be... Soon you will...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: She is coming...

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Must escape the blue.. Deep deep blue

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Pardon?

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Family... Under the blue... Must escape the blue...

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Lost to us.. She is Lost to us...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who is lost?

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Trapped by the light... Lost and trapped...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ermm... So you don't want to tell me then?

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Trapped... In stone and darkness...

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Must find family...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Soon we will all be together...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you ok?

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Must find family... They are all under the blue... Deep deep under the blue...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ermm... I'll leave you to it then.

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Below the deep, deep blue she waits...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who waits?

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: They came to her with fire and faith...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who? Who came to who?

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Too many... Too many...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Too many what? Make sense!

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Locked away for all eternity...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You'd better start making sense Sonny Jim or I'll...

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Free... Soon to be free...

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Free of the deep blue we are...

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: We must find...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: a new home...

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: We must leave this place...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where will you go?

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Away.. Away to her...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Riiight.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ouch!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: What? Who are you? Come inside quickly!

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm trying to find out what happened to a boy named Kennith.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: Oh you mean Kent's son. He's around somewhere, probably hiding if he knows what's good for him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hiding from what? What's got you so frightened?

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: Haven't you seen all those things out there?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The sea slugs?

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: It all began about a week ago. We pulled up a haul of deep sea flatfish. Mixed in with them we found those slug things, but thought nothing of it.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: Not long after that my friends began to change, now they spend all day pulling in hauls of fish, only to throw back the fish and keep those nasty sea slugs.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: What am I supposed to do with those? I haven't figured out how to kill one yet, if I put them near the stove they squirm and jump away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I doubt they would taste too good.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: This is no time for humour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I didn't mean to upset you.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: That's okay. I just can't shake the feeling that this is the start of something... Terrible.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you okay young one?

lines.speaker: Kennith
lines.text: No, I want my daddy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where is your father?

lines.speaker: Kennith
lines.text: He went to get help days ago.

lines.speaker: Kennith
lines.text: The nasty fishermen tried to throw me and daddy into the sea. So he told me to hide here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's good advice, you stay here and I'll go try and find your father.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you okay?

lines.speaker: Kennith
lines.text: I want to see daddy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm working on it.

sections.title: Talking to Holgart after talking to Kennith

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Holgart, something strange is going on here.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: You're telling me, none of the sailors seem to remember who I am.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Apparently Kennith's father left for help a couple of days ago.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: That's a worry, no-one's heard from him on shore. Come on, we'd better go look for him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where are we?

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Someway off mainland still. You'd better see if me old matey's okay.

lines.speaker: Kent
lines.text: Oh thank Saradomin! I thought I'd be left out here forever.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your wife sent me out to find you and your boy. Kennith's fine by the way, he's on the platform.

lines.speaker: Kent
lines.text: I knew the row boat wasn't sea worthy. I couldn't risk bringing him along but you must get him off that platform.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's going on here?

lines.speaker: Kent
lines.text: Five days ago we pulled in a huge catch. As well as fish we caught small slug like creatures, hundreds of them.

lines.speaker: Kent
lines.text: That's when the fishermen began to act strange.

lines.speaker: Kent
lines.text: It was the sea slugs, they attach themselves to your body and somehow take over the mind of the carrier.

lines.speaker: Kent
lines.text: I told Kennith to hide until I returned but I was washed up here.

lines.speaker: Kent
lines.text: Please go back and get my boy, you can send help for me later.

lines.speaker: Kent
lines.text: [player name] wait!

lines.speaker: Kent
lines.text: A few more minutes and that thing would have full control of your body.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yuck! Thanks Kent.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Kent
lines.text: Oh my, I must get back to shore.

sections.title: Talking to Holgart again before returning to the fishing platform

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We'd better get back to the platform so we can see what's going on.

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: You're right. It all sounds pretty creepy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: Oh, thank the gods it's you. They've all gone mad I tell you, one of the fishermen tried to throw me into the sea!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They're all being controlled by the sea slugs.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: I figured as much.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to get Kennith off this platform, but I can't get past the fishermen.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: The sea slugs are scared of heat, I figured that out when I tried to cook them.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: Here.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: I doubt the fishermen will come near you if you can get this torch lit.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: The only problem is all the wood and flint are damp... I can't light a thing!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've managed to lose my torch.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: That was silly, fortunately I have another. Here, take it.

sections.title: Talking to Bailey again with the unlit torch

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better find a way to light this torch, and soon.

sections.title: Talking to Bailey with the lit torch

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've managed to light the torch.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: Well done traveller, you'd better get Kennith out of here soon.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: The fishermen are becoming stranger by the minute, and they keep pulling up those blasted sea slugs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry I'm working on it.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: Just be sure to watch your back. The fishermen seem to have taken notice of you.

sections.title: Attempting to go upstairs with an unlit torch

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ouch!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Kennith, are you okay?

lines.speaker: Kennith
lines.text: No, I want my daddy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You'll be able to see him soon. First we need to get you back to land, come with me to the boat.

lines.speaker: Kennith
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What, why not?

lines.speaker: Kennith
lines.text: I'm scared of those nasty sea slugs. I won't go near them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, you wait here and I'll go figure another way to get you out.

sections.title: Talking to Kennith after making a hole in the wall

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Kennith, I've made an opening in the wall. You can come out through there.

lines.speaker: Kennith
lines.text: Are there any sea slugs on the other side?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Kennith, I've made an opening in the wall. You can come out through there.

lines.speaker: Kennith
lines.text: Are there any sea slugs on the other side?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not one.

lines.speaker: Kennith
lines.text: How will I get downstairs?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll figure that out in a moment.

lines.speaker: Kennith
lines.text: Ok, when you have I'll come out.

sections.title: Talking to Bailey after freeing Kennith

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Bailey.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: Hello again. I saw you managed to get Kennith off the platform. Well done. He wasn't safe around those slugs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you going to come back with us?

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: No, these fishermen are my friends, I'm sure they can be saved. I'm going to stay and try to get rid of all these slugs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have a way of removing the slugs once they've attached themselves to someone?

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: Not yet but I'll keep working on it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I only hope they stay confined to the fishing platform.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: Yes, I dread to think what would happen if they got to Witchaven nearby.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: I guess I'll just have to keep an eye on things here until a way of removing the slugs can be found.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're braver than most. Take care of yourself Bailey.

lines.speaker: Bailey
lines.text: You too [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Did you get the kid back to shore?

lines.speaker: Holgart
lines.text: Yes, he's safe and sound with his parents. Your turn to return to land now adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looking forward to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: Brave [player name], you've returned!

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: Kennith told me about the strange goings-on at the platform. I had no idea it was so serious.

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: I could have lost my son and my husband if it wasn't for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We found Kent stranded on an island.

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: Yes, Holgart told me and sent a rescue party out. Kent's back home now, resting with Kennith. I don't think he'll be doing any fishing for a while.

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: Here, take these Oyster pearls as a reward. They're worth quite a bit and can be used to make lethal crossbow bolts.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Caroline
lines.text: Thank you. Take care of yourself [player name].
